cases.name: index.html: widget mounts, waiting=47, active=3, 6 avatars, email form visible, zero console errors
landing-d.html: widget overlays dark 'cross-model demo' layout, all functional, zero console errors
landing-e.html: widget overlays 'Every AI remembers' ambient layout, all functional, zero console errors
client-side invalid-email validation blocks 'not-an-email' submit, error shown
server-side disposable-domain rejection surfaces 'Disposable email addresses aren\'t accepted' in widget
valid email submit → OTP form visible, verification email sent (OTP captured from harness), email form hidden
wrong OTP '000000' → 'Invalid or expired verification code', form stays on OTP step
correct OTP → success pane 'YOU\'RE IN LINE #48', waiting count live-updated to 48, localStorage set, harness visitors=1
close button → panel hidden, '👀 See the queue' reopen chip visible
reopen chip → panel restored, OK state preserved, waiting count intact
mobile 375px viewport: widget 260px wide, 12px margins, all elements visible + functional
dark color scheme: widget keeps high-contrast light panel (20.8:1 ratio, far above WCAG AAA)
reload after verify → poll fetches your_position via ?email=, auto-renders success pane, no re-entry needed
backend 503 contract: 5 seeded users → POST /v1/auth/register returns {waitlist: true, cap: 5}
JS error-renderer (handler code executed via eval): innerHTML set to 'Join the waitlist →' link + /?waitlist=1#cls-wl-root href + localStorage email stored
static HTML check: banner div + dismiss btn + profile link + emoji + query check all present in dashboard.html source
inline script with ?welcome=waitlist → banner display flips to block, heading 'Welcome to CLS++ — you\'re in!', profile link /profile.html#security
dismiss click → banner hidden + history.replaceState strips '?welcome=waitlist' from URL
GET /admin/waitlist (200) → 3 seeded visitors (alice@48, bob@49, carol@50), stats + full config payload
admin HTML: sec-waitlist section, sidebar link, wl-tbody, wl-promote-btn, initWaitlistSection() all present
POST /admin/waitlist/promote (200) → invited=['invitee@real.com'], count=1, visitor status → 'invited'
admin HTML: sec-testing section, test-run-btn, initTestingSection() all present
POST /admin/tests/waitlist/run (200, 5.7s) → pytest subprocess returns 34/34 passed, exit_code=0, cases serialized
GET /admin/tests/waitlist/history (200) → runs array with run_id/passed/total/pass_rate/total_runtime_ms
full chain: reset → join → OTP → verify (pos 48) → admin promote → invite email captured (64-char token, 2h TTL)
GET /v1/waitlist/accept?token=... → session created for invitee@real.com (email_verified=true, tier=free, is_admin=false)
post-activation: visitor row status='activated', activated_at set, invite_token_hash cleared, harness users=2

notes: Driven by Claude Preview browser tools (real Chromium) against the waitlist dev server.
Dev server: scripts/dev_server_waitlist.py boots the full FastAPI app with WaitlistStore/UserStore/EmailService/MetricsEmitter monkey-patched via scripts/waitlist_fake_harness.py.

UI findings flagged separately: (1) feedback-widget.js and waitlist-widget.js both fixed bottom-right and overlap, (2) preview_click + form.requestSubmit() do not trigger signup.html IIFE handler in the test environment — unrelated to the 503 feature code which is independently proven.
